Name: AmountDC
Description: Total amount in the default currency of the company

Name: AmountDiscount
Description: Discount amount in the default currency of the company

Name: AmountDiscountExclVat
Description: Discount amount excluding VAT in the default currency of the company

Name: AmountFC
Description: Total amount in the currency of the transaction

Name: AmountFCExclVat
Description: Amount exclude VAT in the currency of the transaction.

Name: ApprovalStatus
Description: Approval status of purchase order. 0=Awaiting approval, 1=Automatically, 2=Approved.

Name: Approver
Description: User who approved the purchase order

Name: DeliveryContactPersonFullName
Description: Name of the contact person of the customer who will receive delivered goods

Name: Document
Description: Document that is manually linked to the purchase order

Name: DropShipment
Description: Shows if it is a drop shipment purchase order

Name: ExchangeRate
Description: The exchange rate between the invoice currency and the default currency of the division.

Name: IncotermVersion
Description: Version of Incoterm Supported version for Incoterms : 2010, 2020

Name: OrderNumber
Description: Human readable id of the purchase order

Name: PaymentCondition
Description: The payment condition code used for due date and discount calculation

Name: ReceiptDate
Description: This field shows the date the goods are expected to be received.

Name: Remarks
Description: Include any relevant remarks regarding the purchase order.

Name: SalesOrder
Description: Reference to sales order when purchase order generated via back to back sales order. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order.

Name: SalesOrderNumber
Description: Number of the sales order. Show NULL if more than one sales order is linked to the purchase order.

Name: SelectionCode
Description: ID of selection code. Only supported by the Plus, Professional and Premium for Wholesale & Distribution and Manufacturing

Name: Source
Description: This shows how the purchase order was created: 1-Manual entry, 2-Import, 3-Other, 4-Purchase order, 5-Sales order, 6-Supplier's items, 7-Subcontract, 8-Purchase order advice, 9-Shop order, 10-MRP calculation, 11-Rest API, 12-Merge purchase orders

Name: SupplierContactPersonFullName
Description: Contact person full name of supplier

Name: VATAmount
Description: Total VAT amount in the currency of the transaction

Name: YourRef
Description: Shows the reference number associated with the purchase order. Enter a description and reference to make the purchase order easier to identify.
